summary: iter142 — 'Demander à recevoir' (Payment Requests) tested. Backend: 21/21 pytest passed (CRUD, public preview no-leak, QR PNG, fulfill, double-fulfill 409, self-pay 400, owner-only cancel 403, expired 410, list, 404s). Frontend smoke: anonymous PayPage renders correctly with login/register CTAs and redirect param honoured; cancelled status block visible; login URL keeps ?redirect=/pay/<id>. Authenticated UI flows (owner self-warning, Bob pay button, WalletPage 'Demander' modal) could NOT be verified end-to-end via Playwright because the live login form requires Cloudflare Turnstile + on-page math captcha — those flows were instead validated via direct API + the existing manual screenshot evidence from the main agent.

minor.issue: First cold-start request can take >30s (SSL handshake on preview). Tests work after 1 retry — same warm-up flake observed in iter141.

issues: pay-amount renders without space between number and currency (e.g. '75,00XAF' instead of '75,00 XAF').

backend_pytest_21_21_pass.TestCreatePaymentRequest.test_create_suc: PASS — request_id=pr_*, status=pending, currency=XAF, pay_url starts with FRONTEND_URL (no internal cluster hostname leak), qr_url, whatsapp_url, share_text, requester present
backend_pytest_21_21_pass.TestCreatePaymentRequest.test_get_public: PASS — 200, no _id, no password, no email leak
backend_pytest_21_21_pass.TestCreatePaymentRequest.test_qr_returns: PASS — 200, content-type image/png, valid PNG magic bytes
backend_pytest_21_21_pass.TestFulfillFlow.test_fulfill_success_and: PASS — 200, payment_request_id linked, public preview shows status=paid + fulfilled_tx_id + fulfilled_at
backend_pytest_21_21_pass.TestCancelAndExpire.test_expired_request: PASS — direct DB UPDATE forced expires_at to past, fulfill→410, public preview→status=expired
backend_pytest_21_21_pass.TestListMine.test_list_returns_my_reques: PASS — list non-empty, all required keys present

frontend_smoke.anon_PayPage_renders: PASS — pay-card visible, pay-amount=75,00XAF, pay-note='« TEST_FE_anon »', pay-login-cta + pay-register-cta visible
frontend_smoke.cancelled_status_block: PASS — pay-status-cancelled rendered for cancelled request, no pay-confirm-button
frontend_smoke.owner_self_warning: NOT VERIFIED — live login form needs Turnstile + math captcha (test-bypass works only on /api/auth/login JSON, not on the rendered LoginPage form)
frontend_smoke.WalletPage_request_money_button_and_moda: NOT VERIFIED — same blocker (Wallet route auth-gates and the test couldn't authenticate via the on-page form)
frontend_smoke.paid_status_block: NOT FULLY VERIFIED — Bob's fulfill via API returned 400 (likely insufficient balance after pytest run consumed most of his balance). The pytest run independently verified pay-status-paid behaviour.

action_items: (Cosmetic) Add a thin space between amount and currency in the PayPage 'pay-amount' element (currently '75,00XAF' should be '75,00 XAF').
(Optional) Lower the cold-start latency on /api/wallet/payment-requests by warming the wallet/auth modules at boot — first call after preview wake-up consistently exceeds 30s.

(Test infra, not the feature) Expose a documented test-bypass for the LoginPage/RegisterPage UI flow (Turnstile + math-captcha) similar to TURNSTILE_TEST_BYPASS_TOKEN, OR auto-bypass when the /api/auth/captcha returns 'required':false. This currently blocks Playwright E2E tests that need a real authenticated session in the browser.
critical_code_review_comments: wallet.py:830-840 — fulfill_payment_request reuses send_money internally. Good. But note: the audit-log inside send_money will record the payer's full name as recipient; it might be useful to also tag it with payment_request_id explicitly in the audit notes (currently only included in the 'notes' field).

wallet.py:851 — UPDATE uses status IN ('pending','paid') so an idempotent replay is safe; nice. Consider adding a unique constraint on fulfilled_tx_id at the DB level to prevent two requests sharing the same tx accidentally.

wallet.py:643-659 — _build_pay_link prefers FRONTEND_URL (✅ verified pay_url uses public host). Fallback to x-forwarded-host is fine but in a misconfigured prod where the env var is empty, headers can be spoofed — recommend log-warning when falling back.
wallet.py is now 2052 lines. With 6 new endpoints added, splitting into wallet_send.py / wallet_payment_requests.py / wallet_deposit.py would help — same comment as iter141 on duel.py.

success_rate.frontend: 60% (4/7 verifiable selectors PASS; 3 require authenticated browser session blocked by Turnstile+captcha)

test_credentials: alice@japap.com/Alice2026!, bob@japap.com/Test1234! with TURNSTILE_TEST_BYPASS_TOKEN=JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 + math captcha solved via /api/auth/captcha
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter142_* payment requests via API: anon-test, owner-test, paid (via Bob fulfill), cancelled, expire-test (force-expired via DB UPDATE).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend payment-requests stack is fully verified (21/21 pytest). Frontend authenticated UI flows (modal on Wallet, owner self-warning, Bob pay button) need a Playwright login-bypass to be testable in CI — currently blocked by Turnstile widget + on-page math captcha on LoginPage. The MAIN AGENT manually screenshotted these flows working. If you need to re-run, pre-warm the backend with one curl call before the test fixtures (cold-start adds ~30s). The fulfill endpoint uses the existing send_money idempotency_key='pay_req_<id>', so repeating a successful fulfill returns the SAME tx_id (verified).
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Only one minor cosmetic: amount/currency spacing in PayPage display.
